summary: Storefront cart/checkout navigation bug fix verified. All 13 features tested and working correctly. The two bugs (ProductSelectionModal passing string IDs, ShoppingCart mousedown race condition) have been fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: SoulFoodApp.js lines 2519-2529: onAddToCart now correctly passes item as object with {id, name, price, quantity, series, seriesName, edition, medium} instead of string product ID
ShoppingCart.js: Removed document-level mousedown handler that caused race condition with dual-instance rendering (desktop + mobile headers share isCartOpen state)
ShoppingCart.js line 22: handleCheckout uses window.location.href = '/checkout' for reliable navigation
CartContext.js addToCart: Handles both object items (custom) and string product IDs (PRODUCTS lookup) - line 114 checks typeof itemOrProductId
ProductSelectionModal.js handleAddToCart: Creates cart item object with product_id, product_name, series, edition, medium, quantity, unit_price
context_for_next_testing_agent: Storefront cart/checkout navigation fully tested. Key findings: (1) ProductSelectionModal opens correctly for all series (Holiday, Break*fast, Lunch). (2) Modal shows edition selection (AE/YE/IE), quantity input, and price. (3) Clicking modal's 'Add to Cart' button adds item to cart with correct data. (4) Cart badge increments correctly. (5) Cart dropdown auto-opens after adding item. (6) Cart shows correct product name, price, quantity. (7) Checkout button navigates to /checkout page. (8) Checkout page shows cart summary with Sign In and Continue as Guest options. (9) Cart closes on overlay click and X button click. (10) Quantity +/- buttons work. (11) Bundle section 'Buy Now' button adds bundle to cart. (12) Multiple items can be added to cart. Note: Two ShoppingCart instances exist (desktop + mobile header) sharing isCartOpen state - use .first selector in Playwright tests.

front_page_loads_with_product_cards.details: Front page loads with 4 'Add to Cart' buttons on series cards

add_to_cart_opens_product_modal.details: Clicking 'Add to Cart' on Break*fast and Holiday series opens ProductSelectionModal

modal_shows_edition_selection.details: Modal shows Adult Edition (AE), Youth Edition (YE), Instructor Edition (IE) options

modal_shows_quantity_and_price.details: Modal shows quantity input and price (e.g., $11.99 for Break*fast, $16.99 for Holiday)

modal_add_to_cart_button_works.details: Clicking 'Add to Cart - $X.XX' button adds item to cart, shows toast notification

cart_badge_increments.details: Cart badge shows count (1, 2, etc.) after adding items

cart_dropdown_auto_opens.details: Cart dropdown auto-opens after adding item, shows product name, price, quantity

checkout_shows_cart_summary.details: Checkout page shows '1 item in cart' / '2 items in cart' with correct total

checkout_shows_sign_in_and_guest.details: Checkout page shows Sign In button (data-testid='checkout-sign-in-btn') and Continue as Guest button (data-testid='checkout-guest-btn')

cart_closes_on_overlay_click.details: Cart closes when clicking the overlay (click-outside works)

cart_closes_on_x_button.details: Cart closes when clicking the X button

cart_quantity_buttons_work.details: Cart quantity +/- buttons work correctly (console logs show updateQuantity called)

bundle_add_to_cart_works.details: Bundle section 'Buy Now — $21.99' button adds bundle to cart, shows toast 'Bundle added to cart!'

multiple_items_work.details: Adding Break*fast AE + Holiday AE results in 'Cart (2)' with $28.98 total

bug_1_product_id_lookup_failure.description: ProductSelectionModal addToCart was passing string product IDs that didn't exist in PRODUCTS lookup
bug_1_product_id_lookup_failure.fix: SoulFoodApp.js onAddToCart now passes item as object with all required fields

bug_2_checkout_navigation_race_condition.description: ShoppingCart had dual-instance mousedown handler race condition preventing Checkout navigation
bug_2_checkout_navigation_race_condition.fix: Removed document-level mousedown handler, uses overlay onClick for close
